listitem.para: * x = a matrix (or vector), nobs x nvar
* nlag = # of lags for each vector in x
* init = (optional) scalar value to feed initial missing values (default = 0)
* xlag = a matrix of lags (nobs x nvar*nlag)

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Generates a matrix of n lags from a matrix (or vector) containing a set of vectors (For use in var routines): rows are ordered by lags (and not by vectors as in mlag).

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
